title: Pre-made update with own status
excerpt: We like to request have this pre-made update feature but with our the Status we created (not only for Done), as we notice currently only work with Status c/w monday.com

posts.author: Wildman (KC Low)
posts.cookedHtml:
We like to request have this pre-made update feature but with our the Status we created (not only for Done), as we notice currently only work with Status c/w monday.com

image1007×356 16.6 KB

posts.author: thisispamduffy (Pam Duffy)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like this, for example, change status from “Approval Needed” to “Needs Revision”. We can accomplish this with the native automations but it doesn’t have the same nice color or layout as the pre-made update does.

posts.author: stone.kane (Stone Kane)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have the same request. We love the look & feel of the pre-made status update, but marking the status as “Done” doesn’t always make sense.

It would be great it the recipe was When Status changes to Dynamic Option, create a pre-made status update.
